title: 3. Executing the Agent run loop programmatically

blocks.content: Under the hood, the runtime executes a cycle: parse prompt -> query model -> trigger tools -> review tool results -> query model -> emit final response. Programmatic bindings allow developers to control each iteration of this loop.

Question 1: What is the benefit of using execute_iterative over execute?
- A) It runs faster.
- B) It yields intermediate steps, allowing UI feedback and step validation.
- C) It bypasses local API keys.

Feedback: Option B is correct. Iterative execution lets developers render ongoing agent progress to users.
